title: Magic Squares
description:
Magic Squares are square arrays of numbers that have the interesting property that the numbers in each column, and in each row, all add up to the same total.

Given a 4 × 4 square of numbers, determine if it is magic square.
input: The input consists of four lines, each line having 4 space-separated integers.
output: Output either magic if the input is a magic square, or not magic if the input is not a magic square.
source: Olympiad, Canadian Computing Competition & Olympiad, 2016, CCC 2016 Junior Division
